dependencyDashboardHeader:
Uses https://github.com/bettermarks/renovate-config#python  
PR that have automerge enabled [might be approved automatically](https://github.com/bettermarks/approve-dependency-pr#readme)

description: Python's minor updates may be breaking so are actually major updates per semver.
works for both .python-version and docker versions.
Makes both patch and minor versions available so either can be chosen.
